mapper.select: SELECT r.id as orderNo, r.order_sts as orderStatus, r.payment_sts as paymentStatus, r.order_type as orderType, r.order_kbn as orderKbn, r.route_id as routeId, r.order_name as orderNm, DATE_FORMAT(r.start_time,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as pickupDte, r.pickup_place_id as pickupLoc, p1.name_zh as pickupLocNm, p1.address_zh as pickupLocAddr, r.flight_no as flightNo, r.car_category as carType, r.drop_place_id as dropLoc, p2.name_zh as dropLocNm, p2.address_zh as dropLocAddr, DATE_FORMAT(r.return_time,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as returnDte, r.rtn_pickup_place_id as rtnPickupLoc, p3.name_zh as rtnPickupLocNm, p3.address_zh as rtnPickupLocAddr, r.rtn_drop_place_id as rtnDorpLoc, p4.name_zh as rtnDorpLocNm, p4.address_zh as rtnDorpLocAddr, r.use_hours as useHours, r.order_distance as orderDistance, r.passenger_name as customerNm, r.aldult_num as passengerNum, r.big_luggage_num as lunguageNum, r.need_child_seat as needChdChair, r.need_baby_seat as needNameSign, r.need_hotel_checkin as needHotelChkIn, r.need_airport_checkin as needFlightChkIn, r.server_price as computedPrice FROM yy_order r left join yy_place p1 on r.pickup_place_id = p1.id left join yy_place p2 on r.drop_place_id = p2.id left join yy_place p3 on r.rtn_pickup_place_id = p3.id left join yy_place p4 on r.rtn_drop_place_id = p4.id WHERE r.customer_id = #{customerId}
